translations.Aktuell gültiger Wert aus dem Arbeitszei: Currently valid value from the work schedule profile. To change it, edit the profile below or create a new one.
translations.Monat genehmigt – Einträge gesperrt. Kor: Month approved – entries locked. Corrections only by HR.
translations.Möchten Sie die Zeiteinträge für {month}: Do you want to submit the time entries for {month}? The submitted entries will be sent for approval.
translations.Stammdaten und Standardwerte, die für ne: Master data and default values pre-selected for new employees.
translations.Wochenstunden und Urlaubstage ergeben si: Weekly hours and vacation days are derived from the work schedule profile below and are maintained there.
translations.Aktuell sind keine Team-Abwesenheiten si: No team absences are currently visible.
translations.Aktuell wartet nichts auf Ihre Genehmigu: Nothing is currently awaiting your approval.
translations.{count} Einträge genehmigt – PDF wird im: {count} entries approved – PDF is being archived in the background (may take a few minutes).
translations.PDF nach dem Genehmigen sofort archivier: Archive the PDF immediately after approval
translations.{count} Einträge genehmigt – PDF im Arch: {count} entries approved – PDF created in the archive.
{count} entries approved – PDF updated in the archive.
translations.Die PDF-Archivierung läuft über einen Hi: PDF archiving runs via a background job (roughly every 5 minutes). Here you see pending and failed archiving runs.
translations.Warum wird der Monat zurückgewiesen?: Why is the month being rejected?
translations.Warum wird die Genehmigung zurückgenomme: Why is the approval being withdrawn?
translations.Erzeugt einen Arbeitszeitnachweis als PD: Generates a timesheet PDF for a freely selectable date range (e.g. from the 20th to the 20th).
translations.Das Enddatum darf nicht vor dem Startdat: The end date must not be before the start date.
Weekly hours must be greater than 0. For a temporary leave (e.g. parental leave) record an absence instead of 0 hours.
translations.0 Arbeitstage in diesem Monat – vermutli: 0 working days this month – a valid work schedule with weekly hours greater than 0 is probably missing. Please check the employee's work schedule.
translations.Eingereicht – Bearbeitung erst nach Gene: Submitted – editing only possible after approval or rejection.
translations.Monat genehmigt – gesperrt. Korrektur nu: Month approved – locked. Corrections by HR only.
translations.Es werden maximal 200 Einträge angezeigt: Showing a maximum of 200 entries. Use filters to narrow down the results.
translations.Es sind noch keine Mitarbeiter eingerich: No employees have been set up yet. Go to Settings to add employees and get started.
translations.Sie haben noch kein Mitarbeiterprofil. B: You don't have an employee profile yet. Please contact your administrator or HR manager to get activated.
translations.Inaktive Projekte stehen nicht mehr zur: Inactive projects are no longer available for selection.
translations.Dieses Projekt ist dem Mitarbeiter nicht: This project is not assigned to the employee.
translations.Legen Sie Projekte an, um projektbezogen: Create projects to use project-based time tracking.
translations.Möchten Sie das Projekt \"{name}\" wirkl: Do you really want to delete the project "{name}"?
translations.Diese Zeiten werden beim Anlegen neuer Z: These times will be pre-filled when creating new time entries.
translations.Mindestpause: {minutes} min (§4 ArbZG): Minimum break: {minutes} min (§4 German Working Hours Act)
translations.Nach §3 ArbZG sind maximal 10 Stunden er: According to §3 of the German Working Hours Act, a maximum of 10 hours is permitted (exceptions possible).
translations.Möchten Sie diesen Eintrag wirklich lösc: Do you really want to delete this entry?
No data available for this year.
translations.Der Monat wird wieder zur Bearbeitung fr: The month is unlocked for editing again. The employee can correct it and resubmit.
translations.Halber Tag = 0,5 Tage. Start- und Enddat: Half day = 0.5 days. Start and end date are identical.
translations.Sie haben noch keine Abwesenheiten einge: You haven't recorded any absences yet.
translations.Name: Name
translations.Legen Sie Mitarbeiter an, um die Zeiterf: Add employees to start using time tracking.
translations.Möchten Sie den Mitarbeiter \"{name}\" w: Do you really want to delete the employee "{name}"?
translations.Möchten Sie dieses Arbeitszeitprofil wir: Do you really want to delete this work schedule?
translations.Pausenregelung (§4 ArbZG): Break Rules (§4 German Working Hours Act)
translations.Mindestpause gemäß deutschem Arbeitszeit: Minimum break according to the German Working Hours Act
translations.Heiligabend (24.12.) als halber Arbeitst: Christmas Eve (Dec 24) as half working day
translations.Silvester (31.12.) als halber Arbeitstag: New Year's Eve (Dec 31) as half working day
translations.Definieren Sie, ob Heiligabend und Silve: Define whether Christmas Eve and New Year's Eve count as half working days.
translations.Feiertage anzeigen, hinzufügen, bearbeit: View, add, edit and delete public holidays.
translations.Möchten Sie den Feiertag \"{name}\" ({co: Do you really want to delete the public holiday "{name}" ({count} federal states)?
translations.Keine Feiertage für diese Auswahl gefund: No public holidays found for this selection.
translations.Hinweis: Änderungen wirken sich auf neu: Note: Changes affect newly generated public holidays. Regenerate public holidays to apply the changes.
translations.Genehmigte Monatsberichte werden automat: Approved monthly reports are automatically archived as PDF.
translations.PDFs werden in Ihrem persönlichen Ordner: PDFs are saved in your personal folder. Only you have access.
translations.Mitarbeiter ist abwesend. Grund ist nur: Employee is absent. Reason is only visible to supervisors.
translations.Legen Sie fest, wer Ihre Abwesenheiten i: Define who can see your absences in the absence overview. Supervisors and HR can always see your absences.
translations.Diese Abwesenheit stornieren? Sie bleibt: Cancel this absence? It will remain visible with status "Cancelled".
translations.Bezahlter Erholungsurlaub. Wird vom Urla: Paid vacation. Deducted from your vacation allowance.
translations.Krankmeldung. Arbeitszeit gilt als gelei: Sick note. Counts as hours worked, no vacation days deducted.
translations.Ihr Kind ist krank. Wie Krankheit, keine: Your child is sick. Same as sickness, no vacation days.
translations.Bezahlte Freistellung, z.B. Hochzeit, Um: Paid leave, e.g. wedding, moving or bereavement.
translations.Schulung, Seminar oder Konferenz. Zählt: Training, seminar or conference. Counts as working hours.
translations.Freistellung ohne Gehalt. Reduziert die: Leave without pay. Reduces your target hours.
translations.Überstunden als Freizeit nehmen. Reduzie: Use overtime as time off. Reduces your overtime.
translations.Freizeitausgleich wird nicht als Arbeits: Compensatory time is not credited as working time. The target stays the same, which lowers your overtime.
translations.Differenz zwischen Soll und Ist. Im lauf: Difference between target and actual. May still change during the current month.
translations.Das Soll wird anteilig bis gestern berec: The target is calculated proportionally up to yesterday. Today only counts once you record time.
translations.Gesetzliche Pausenregelung: Ab 6 Stunden: Legal break regulation: At least 30 minutes break for more than 6 hours of work, at least 45 minutes for more than 9 hours.
translations.Neue Mitarbeiter bekommen dieses Bundesl: New employees are automatically assigned this federal state. Each employee can have their own — it determines which public holidays apply.
translations.Neue Mitarbeiter bekommen diese Wochenst: New employees get these weekly hours as default. Can be adjusted individually in the employee profile.
translations.Neue Mitarbeiter bekommen diesen Urlaubs: New employees get this vacation entitlement as default. The actual entitlement is set in the employee profile.
translations.Wenn ein Zeiteintrag diesen Wert übersch: A warning is shown when a time entry exceeds this value. German law (§3 ArbZG) allows a maximum of 10 hours.
translations.Wenn aktiv, muss bei jedem Zeiteintrag e: When active, a project must be selected for every time entry — otherwise it cannot be saved.
When active, a description must be entered for every time entry — otherwise it cannot be saved.
translations.Wenn deaktiviert, können Mitarbeiter nur: When disabled, employees can only enter times for today or past days — not in advance.
translations.Wenn aktiv, durchlaufen Zeiteinträge ein: When active, time entries go through an approval workflow: employees submit the month and supervisors approve it. If disabled, this step is skipped and recorded times apply directly. The hours calculation is the same either way.
translations.Gesetzliche Mindestpause bei mehr als 6: Legal minimum break for more than 6 hours of work. Automatically suggested when creating a time entry.
translations.Gesetzliche Mindestpause bei mehr als 9: Legal minimum break for more than 9 hours of work. Automatically suggested when creating a time entry.
translations.Wenn ein Monat genehmigt wird, speichert: When a month is approved, WorkTime automatically saves a PDF report in this folder. The folder is in your personal storage — only you as admin have access. Automatic archiving only applies when approval is enabled; if disabled, use the PDF export in the monthly overview.
translations.Wenn aktiviert, wird das Tagessoll am 24: When enabled, the daily target on Dec 24 is halved. Example: With 8 hrs/day, only 4 hrs count as target.
translations.Wenn aktiviert, wird das Tagessoll am 31: When enabled, the daily target on Dec 31 is halved. Example: With 8 hrs/day, only 4 hrs count as target.
translations.Vertraglich vereinbarte Arbeitszeit pro: Contractually agreed working hours per week. WorkTime calculates the daily target from this (weekly hours ÷ working days per week).
translations.Jährlicher Urlaubsanspruch. Jeder genomm: Annual vacation entitlement. Each taken vacation day is deducted. The remaining entitlement is shown in the time tracking.
translations.An wie vielen Tagen pro Woche wird gearb: How many days per week does this employee work? Together with weekly hours, this determines the daily target. Example: 40 hrs over 5 days = 8 hrs/day, 30 hrs over 4 days = 7.5 hrs/day.
translations.Legt fest, welche gesetzlichen Feiertage: Determines which public holidays apply to this employee. Bavaria has more public holidays than Hamburg, for example.
translations.Diese Person kann die Zeiteinträge und A: This person can view and approve this employee's time entries and absence requests.
translations.Ab diesem Datum erscheint der Mitarbeite: The employee appears in time tracking from this date. No target hours are calculated for months before this.
translations.Ab diesem Datum kann der Mitarbeiter kei: From this date, the employee can no longer create new entries. All existing data is preserved.
translations.Inaktive Mitarbeiter können keine Zeiten: Inactive employees can no longer track time and don't appear in selection lists. Their existing data and reports are preserved.
translations.Diese Abwesenheiten (z.B. Krankheit) wer: These absences (e.g. sick leave) are only reported and don't need approval. They are automatically included in target calculations.
translations.Legt fest, ob Kollegen in der Abwesenhei: Determines whether colleagues see your absence reason (e.g. vacation) or just 'absent' in the absence overview. Supervisors and HR always see the reason.
translations.Admin: Volle Rechte (automatisch). HR-Ma: Admin: Full rights (automatic). HR Manager: Manage employees and approve requests (assign manually). Supervisor: Approves their team's time entries (automatic). Employee: Track own time (automatic).
translations.Überstunden und Resturlaub aus dem Vorja: Manually transfer overtime and remaining vacation from the previous year. Completed carryovers are binding and immutable.
translations.Der bestehende Übertrag wird storniert u: The existing carryover will be cancelled and replaced with new values. Both entries are preserved in the audit log.
translations.%1$s hat Zeiteinträge für %2$s zur Geneh: %1$s submitted time entries for %2$s for approval
translations.Deine Zeiteinträge für %s wurden genehmi: Your time entries for %s have been approved
translations.Deine Zeiteinträge für %s wurden abgeleh: Your time entries for %s have been rejected
translations.Die Genehmigung deiner Zeiteinträge für: The approval of your time entries for %s has been revoked. Please submit again.
translations.Mindestpause nicht eingehalten: Bei %1$d: Minimum break not met: %1$d min of working time require %2$d min break (§4 German Working Hours Act); %3$d min recorded (gaps between entries count as break).
Maximum daily working time (%1$s hours) exceeded: %2$s hours recorded on this day.
translations.An diesem Tag haben Sie %s. Bitte storni: You have %s on this day. Please cancel the absence first.
translations.An folgenden Tagen sind bereits Zeiteint: Time entries already exist on the following days: %s. A full-day absence is not possible there. Please remove the time entries first.
translations.Halber Tag ist nur für einen einzelnen T: Half day is only possible for a single day
translations.Halbtägige Abwesenheit (%s) und Zeiteint: Half-day absence (%s) and time entry on the same day.
translations.Gültig-ab darf frühestens der 1. des akt: Valid-from must be no earlier than the 1st of the current month
translations.Ein Profil mit diesem Gültig-ab Datum ex: A profile with this valid-from date already exists
translations.Maximale tägliche Arbeitszeit ist %s Stu: Maximum daily working time is %s hours (see settings)
translations.Steuert firmenweit, ob erfasste Zeiten d: Controls company-wide whether recorded times must be approved by supervisors. This setting affects all employees.
translations.Ab jetzt müssen Zeiten eingereicht und d: From now on, times must be submitted and approved by supervisors.
translations.Der Freigabe-Schritt entfällt für alle M: The approval step is removed for all employees. Recorded times then apply directly. Already approved entries remain locked and cannot be reopened while approval is off.
translations.{names} verliert damit die HR-Manager-Re: {names} will lose HR manager rights (manage employees, approve times). Continue?
translations.{names} verlieren damit die HR-Manager-R: {names} will lose HR manager rights (manage employees, approve times). Continue?
translations.Die automatisch erzeugten Feiertage für: The automatically generated public holidays for {year} are recreated for all federal states. Manually created holidays are preserved.
translations.Klick auf einen Monat öffnet ihn in der: Click a month to open it in the list view.
translations.Hinweis: Der Zeitraum umfasst ca. {reque: Note: the period spans approx. {requested} working days (remaining: {available}). Only your working days according to your work schedule are deducted – fewer for part-time.
translations.Hinweis: ca. {requested} Werktage im Zei: Note: approx. {requested} working days in the period (remaining: {available}). Only working days according to the work schedule are deducted.
translations.Dieser Zeitraum ist abgeschlossen. Bitte: This period is closed. Please contact HR.
translations.Begründung erforderlich (mindestens 10 Z: A reason is required (at least 10 characters).
translations.Änderungen werden protokolliert und dem: Changes are logged and shown to the employee.
translations.Die Änderung wird protokolliert. In abge: The change is logged. In closed months a reason is mandatory; the month is then reopened for re-approval.
translations.z. B. Stempelfehler nach Rücksprache mit: e.g. corrected a clock-in error after consulting the employee
translations.Die Genehmigung deiner Zeiteinträge für: The approval of your time entries for %1$s was withdrawn (reason: %2$s). Please resubmit.
translations.Überstunden in Geld vergüten und vom Sal: Compensate overtime with money and deduct it from the balance. Payouts are recorded in the audit log.
translations.mind. 10 Zeichen, landet im Audit-Log: at least 10 characters, stored in the audit log
translations.Die Auszahlung darf den verfügbaren Sald: The payout must not exceed the available balance.
translations.Bitte einen Grund mit mindestens 10 Zeic: Please provide a reason with at least 10 characters.
translations.Diese Auszahlung löschen? Der Überstunde: Delete this payout? The overtime balance will increase again.
